summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing for OrbSky Hospital MVP. 21/21 backend pytest cases pass (public content, submissions, cookie auth, admin RBAC, doctor CRUD, photo upload + file proxy via Emergent object storage). All 7 public pages render, header navigation works, WhatsApp FAB links to wa.me/918069589900, Specialities lists 20, Doctors lists 12 with working department filter, Doctor profile shows full bio/fee/timings/book button, Services shows 6 categories, About shows stats+story+infrastructure, Contact form POSTs successfully with toast. Appointments multi-step flow (department → doctor → date+time → patient details → submit) confirmed end-to-end with reference id confirmation screen and WhatsApp confirm link. Admin login redirects to /admin, dashboard shows 3 stats + 3 tabs, doctor edit persists across reload, create-doctor POST 200, logout clears cookie and forces redirect to /admin/login on revisit. Photo upload endpoint verified via backend test with real PNG round-trip through /api/files/{path}.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event startup/shutdown (consider lifespan handler) — works fine on current stack, just a future-proofing nit.

Logout response calls response.delete_cookie without specifying secure/samesite=none — browsers may keep the cookie alive in some scenarios. Functional today (test passed), but for cross-site Secure cookies it's safer to mirror set_auth_cookies attributes when deleting.
Object storage put/get path-templating uses requests (sync) inside async FastAPI handlers; OK for low traffic but should be moved to httpx async or a threadpool for scale.

AdminDashboard rename of a seed doctor changes seed data permanently because seed_doctors only runs if collection is empty. Consider a 'TEST_' prefix safeguard in admin UI or document that admin edits persist (not really a bug).
test_credentials: admin@orbskyhospital.com / OrbSky@2026 (verified working, cookie auth + bcrypt $2b$ hash)
seed_data_creation: Tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed appointments, contacts, doctors. Reverted seed doctor 'Dr. Sagar Shankar' name after admin edit test. Residual TEST_ contact/appointment records (2 contacts, 3 appointments) remain in admin lists from test runs — non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend testid prefixes for frontend tests: specialities use 'spec-<slug>' (and 'spec-book-<slug>'); doctors page uses 'doctor-card-<id>' style is NOT used — actual ids are 'doctor-option-<id>' in appointments, and a tags href^=/doctors/ on listing page; Services uses 'service-cat-<kebab>'; Appointments uses 'dept-option-<slug>', 'doctor-option-<id>', shadcn Calendar (not <input type=date>), 'time-<digits>', 'appt-name|age|phone|email|reason', 'appt-next-btn', 'appt-submit-btn'. Admin: 'admin-email', 'admin-password', 'admin-login-btn', 'admin-logout-btn', 'tab-{appointments|doctors|contacts}', 'add-doctor-btn', 'edit-doctor-<id>', 'delete-doctor-<id>', 'save-doctor-btn', 'upload-photo-btn', 'edit-name'. WhatsApp FAB selector: a[href*='wa.me/918069589900']. Cookies are SameSite=None;Secure across cross-origin preview domain (works in Playwright).
